summary: Implemented US-014: single random draw mode. Created pure draw logic (createDrawPool, drawOne, resetPool) in src/domain/drawRandom.ts with immutable pool tracking. Built SingleDraw React component using useReducer for atomic state updates, rendering Draw/Reset buttons, remaining card counter, and CardVisual display. Added hash-based routing to App.tsx (#/play renders SingleDraw). Updated Nav links to use hash routes. Fixed substring false-positive in generated test (sort by prompt length descending before matching). All 176 tests pass, lint and typecheck clean.
